base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: increase net profit or PnL per exposure hour without worsening MAE
expected_effect: Expected to improve squeeze_long PnL per exposure hour and average hold while keeping its low MAE profile intact. Tradeoff is possible truncation of a few convex squeeze winners; reject if squeeze PnL falls materially, completed trades drop more than 10%, total net profit falls below 98% of run_001, or VALID_0DTE performance deteriorates.
label: squeeze-fast-realization
rationale: Use exactly one legal family: batch_b_squeeze_long_take_profit. The prior accepted squeeze package expanded targets and helped from a weaker base, but the current leader already has large selected TP distances, no upside-extension candidates, and squeeze_long average hold is longer than desired. This tests a different mechanism: stronger continuation admission plus faster monetization, while avoiding global vetoes, 1DTE tightening, call-wall loosening, stale-data changes, and repeated charm-wall max-distance follow-through.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Dormant Charm Pin Avoid Split Probe
